message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox

participant "Registry Authority\n[Registry Submission Definition Creator]" as RA
participant "Registry Definition Repository\n[Registry Submission Definition Repository]" as RDR

RA -> RDR : 1. Create submission definition artifacts.
RDR --> RA

RA -> RDR : 2. Update submission definition artifacts.
RDR --> RA

RA -> RDR : 3. Create submission definition artifacts.
RDR --> RA

RA -> RDR : 4. Update submission definition artifacts.
RDR --> RA

@enduml
